test_cases.input: Create a program that optimizes the CPU usage of a given program?

arguments.prompt: Create a program that optimizes the CPU usage of a given program.

tools_called.name: generate_code

args.prompt:
Create a comprehensive Python program that optimizes the CPU usage of a given program/process. The program should:

1. Accept a process name or PID as input (command-line argument)
2. Monitor CPU usage of the target process in real-time
3. Set process priority (nice value on Linux, priority class on Windows) to optimize CPU scheduling
4. Set CPU affinity to limit which cores the process can use
5. Automatically throttle the process (SIGSTOP/SIGCONT on Linux, Suspend/Resume on Windows) if CPU usage exceeds a configurable threshold
6. Support both Linux and Windows platforms
7. Include a daemon mode that continuously monitors and adjusts
8. Provide logging of all actions taken
9. Include a configuration file option for setting thresholds and policies
